body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `Interpolations` package from `0.15.1` to `0.15.1, 0.16`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for Interpolations in [weakdeps] to 0.16, (keep existing compat)

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `CUDA` package from `5.5` to `5.5, 6`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for CUDA in [weakdeps] to 6, (keep existing compat)
